caption: A man with a dark complexion, wearing a white shirt and a checkered beige and brown shawl over his shoulders, speaks into a microphone labeled "ANI" in an outdoor setting with white tents and greenery in the background. Other men are visible behind him, including one in a dark suit. A red and yellow News18 India banner spans the top and bottom of the screen. The top ticker reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" in several frames. The lower news banner reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: I.N.D.I. गठबंधन अपवित्र गठबंधन" across the top row and shifts in the bottom row to "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and "जे. पी. नड्डा: I.N.D.I. गठबंधन परिवार बचाने के लिए". On-screen graphics list names like "सप्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", and "किजैद यादव" alongside a "मंत्री" tag. Advertisements for "MAHAKOSH" and "कच्ची घानी सरसों तेल" appear at the bottom. The scene remains static, with only the on-screen text changing.
